name: HostUtils
summary: Contains static methods to deal with teh runtime environment.

methods.name: AutoInstallPlugInFolder
methods.summary: Gets the auto install plug-in folder for machine or current user.

params.name: currentUser
params.doc: true if the query relates to the current user.

returns.doc: The full path to the revelant auto install plug-in directory.

methods.name: CallFromCoreRhino
methods.summary: Don't change this function in ANY way unless you chat with Steve first! This function is called by Rhino on initial startup and the signature must be exact

methods.name: CheckForRdk
methods.signature: public static bool CheckForRdk(bool throwOnFalse, bool usePreviousResult)
methods.summary: Determines if the RDK is loaded.

params.name: throwOnFalse
params.doc: if the RDK is not loaded, then throws a RdkNotLoadedException.

params.name: usePreviousResult
params.doc: if true, then the last result can be used instaed of performing a full check.

returns.doc: true if the RDK is loaded; false if the RDK is not loaded. Note that the RdkNotLoadedException will hinder the retrieval of any return value.

methods.name: ClearFpuExceptionStatus
methods.summary: Clear FPU exception and busy flags (Intel assembly fnclex)

methods.name: CreateCommands(PlugIn)
methods.summary: Parses a plugin and create all the commands defined therein.

methods.name: CreateCommands(IntPtr, Assembly)
methods.signature: public static int CreateCommands(IntPtr pPlugIn, Assembly pluginAssembly)
methods.summary: Parses a plugin and create all the commands defined therein.

returns.doc: The number of newly created commands.

methods.name: CreatePlugIn
methods.signature: public static PlugIn CreatePlugIn(Type pluginType, bool printDebugMessages)
methods.summary: Instantiates a plug-in type and registers the associated commands and classes.

params.name: pluginType
params.doc: A plug-in type. This type must derive from PlugIn.

params.name: printDebugMessages
params.doc: true if debug messages should be printed.

methods.name: DebugDumpToString(BezierCurve)
methods.summary: Gets the debug dumps. This is a text description of the geometric contents. DebugDump() is intended for debugging and is not suitable for creating high quality text descriptions of an object.

methods.name: DebugDumpToString(GeometryBase)
methods.summary: Gets the debug dumps. This is a text description of the geometric contents. DebugDump() is intended for debugging and is not suitable for creating high quality text descriptions of an object.

methods.name: DebugString(String)
methods.summary: Prints a debug message to the Rhino Command Line. The message will only appear if the SendDebugToCommandLine property is set to true.

methods.name: DebugString(String, Object[])
methods.signature: public static void DebugString(string format, params Object[] args)
methods.summary: Prints a debug message to the Rhino Command Line. The message will only appear if the SendDebugToCommandLine property is set to true.

params.name: args
params.doc: An Object array containing zero or more objects to format.

methods.name: DisplayOleAlerts
methods.summary: Defines if Ole alerts ("Server busy") alerts should be visualized. This function makes no sense on Mono.

methods.name: ExceptionReport(Exception)
methods.summary: Informs RhinoCommon of an exception that has been handled but that the developer wants to screen.

methods.name: ExceptionReport(String, Exception)
methods.signature: public static void ExceptionReport(string source, Exception ex)
methods.summary: Informs RhinoCommon of an exception that has been handled but that the developer wants to screen.

methods.name: ExecuteNamedCallback
methods.signature: public static bool ExecuteNamedCallback(string name, NamedParametersEventArgs args)
methods.summary: Execute a named callback

methods.name: FileNameEndsWithRhinoBackupExtension
methods.summary: Strip file extension from file name and check to see if it is a valid Rhino backup file extension.

returns.doc: Returns true if the file name has an extension like 3dmbak.

methods.name: FileNameEndsWithRhinoExtension
methods.summary: Strip file extension from file name and check to see if it is a valid Rhino file extension.

returns.doc: Returns true if the file name has an extension like 3dm.

methods.name: GetAbsolutePath
methods.signature: public static bool GetAbsolutePath(string relativePath, bool bRelativePathisFileName, string relativeTo, bool bRelativeToIsFileName, out string pathOut)
methods.summary: Call this method to convert a relative path to an absolute path relative to the specified path.

params.name: relativePath
params.doc: Relative path to convert to an absolute path

params.name: bRelativePathisFileName
params.doc: If true then lpsFrom is treated as a file name otherwise it is treated as a directory name

params.name: relativeTo
params.doc: File or folder the path is relative to

params.name: bRelativeToIsFileName
params.doc: If true then lpsFrom is treated as a file name otherwise it is treated as a directory name

params.name: pathOut
params.doc: Reference to string which will receive the computed absolute path

returns.doc: Returns true if parameters are valid and lpsRelativePath is indeed relative to lpsRelativeTo otherwise returns false

methods.name: GetActivePlugInVersionFolders()
methods.summary: Recurses through the auto install plug-in folders and returns the directories containing "active" versions of plug-ins.
methods.remarks: If the same package is installed in both the user and machine locations, the newest directory wins.

methods.name: GetActivePlugInVersionFolders(Boolean)
methods.summary: Recurses through the auto install plug-in folders and returns the directories containing "active" versions of plug-ins.

methods.name: GetAssemblySearchPaths
methods.summary: Returns list of directory names where additional assemblies (plug-ins, DLLs, Grasshopper components) may be located

methods.name: GetCurrentProcessInfo
methods.signature: public static void GetCurrentProcessInfo(out string processName, out Version processVersion)
methods.summary: Returns information about the current process. If Rhino is the top level process, processName is "Rhino". Otherwise, processName is the name, without extension, of the main module that is executing. For example, "compute.backend" or "Revit". processVersion is the System.Version of the running process. It is the FileVersion of the executable.

methods.name: GetCustomComputeEndpoints
methods.summary: Used by compute to define custom endpoints

methods.name: GetPlatformService<T>
methods.signature: public static T GetPlatformService<T>(string assemblyPath = null, string typeFullName = null) where T : class
methods.summary: For internal use only. Loads an assembly for dependency injection via IPlatformServiceLocator.

params.name: assemblyPath
params.doc: The relative path of the assembly, relative to the position of RhinoCommon.dll

params.name: typeFullName
params.doc: The full name of the type that is IPlatformServiceLocator. This is optional.

methods.name: GetRhinoDotNetAssembly
methods.summary: Only works on Windows. Returns null on Mac.

methods.name: GetSystemProcessorCount
methods.summary: Get the processor count on this hardware. It supports querying on CPUs with more than 64 processors (Windows).

methods.name: InitializeRhinoCommon
methods.summary: Makes sure all static RhinoCommon components is set up correctly. This happens automatically when a plug-in is loaded, so you probably won't have to call this method.
methods.remarks: Subsequent calls to this method will be ignored.

methods.name: InitializeRhinoCommon_RDK
methods.summary: Makes sure all static RhinoCommon RDK components are set up correctly. This happens automatically when the RDK is loaded, so you probably won't have to call this method.
methods.remarks: Subsequent calls to this method will be ignored.

methods.name: InitializeZooClient
methods.summary: Initializes the ZooClient and Rhino license manager, this should get called automatically when RhinoCommon is loaded so you probably won't have to call this method.

methods.name: InPlaceConstCast
methods.signature: public static void InPlaceConstCast(GeometryBase geometry, bool makeNonConst)
methods.summary: DO NOT USE UNLESS YOU ARE CERTAIN ABOUT THE IMPLICATIONS. This is an expert user function which should not be needed in most cases. This function is similar to a const_cast in C++ to allow an object to be made temporarily modifiable without causing RhinoCommon to convert the class from const to non-const by creating a duplicate.You must call this function with a true parameter, make your modifications, and then restore the const flag by calling this function again with a false parameter. If you have any questions, please contact McNeel developer support before using!

methods.name: IsManagedDll
methods.summary: Inspects a dll to see if it is compiled as native code or as a .NET assembly

methods.name: IsRhinoBackupFileExtension
methods.summary: Check to see if the file extension is a valid Rhino file extension.

returns.doc: Return true if fileExtension is ".3dmbak", "3dmbak", ".3dm.bak", "3dm.bak", ".3dx.bak" or "3dx.bak", ignoring case.

methods.name: IsRhinoFileExtension
methods.summary: Check to see if the file extension is a valid Rhino file extension.

returns.doc: Returns true if fileExtension is ".3dm", "3dm", ".3dx" or "3dx", ignoring case.

methods.name: RecordInitInstanceTime
methods.summary: Used to help record times at startup with the -stopwatch flag to help determine bottlenecks in start up speed

methods.name: RegisterComputeEndpoint
methods.signature: public static void RegisterComputeEndpoint(string endpointPath, Type t)
methods.summary: Register a class that can participate as a compute endpoint

methods.name: RegisterDynamicCommand
methods.signature: public static bool RegisterDynamicCommand(PlugIn plugin, Command cmd)
methods.summary: Adds a new dynamic command to Rhino.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: RegisterNamedCallback
methods.signature: public static void RegisterNamedCallback(string name, EventHandler<NamedParametersEventArgs> callback)
methods.summary: Register a named callback

methods.name: RemoveNamedCallback
methods.summary: Remove a named callback from the dictionary of callbacks

methods.name: RhinoCommonExceptionHandler
methods.signature: public static void RhinoCommonExceptionHandler(string title, Object sender, Exception ex)
methods.summary: For internal use only!!! Unhanded exception handler, writes stack trace to RhinoDotNet.txt file

params.name: title
params.doc: Exception title to write to text file

methods.name: SendLogMessageToCloudCallbackProc
methods.signature: public static void SendLogMessageToCloudCallbackProc(HostUtils.LogMessageType msg_type, IntPtr pwStringClass, IntPtr pwStringDesc, IntPtr pwStringMessage)
methods.summary: Informs RhinoCommon of an message that has been handled but that the developer wants to screen.

params.name: pwStringDesc
params.doc: Finer grained description of the message.

methods.name: SetInShutDown
methods.summary: Informs the runtime that the application is shutting down.

methods.name: ShutDownRhinoCommon_RDK
methods.summary: Makes sure all static RhinoCommon RDK components are de-initialized so they aren't calling into space when the RDK is unloaded.
methods.remarks: Subsequent calls to this method will be ignored.

methods.name: UnhandledThreadException
methods.signature: public static void UnhandledThreadException(Object sender, ThreadExceptionEventArgs e)
methods.summary: Exception handler for exceptions occurring on the UI thread

properties.name: ComputerSerialNumber
properties.summary: Gets the serial number of the computer running Rhino.

properties.name: CurrentOSLanguage
properties.summary: Get the current operating system language.

properties.name: DeviceId
properties.summary: The DeviceId is a unique, stable ID that anonymously identifies the device that Rhino is running on. It is computed based on hardware information that should not change when the OS is upgraded, or if commonly modified hardware are added or removed from the computer. The machine-specific information is hashed using a cryptographic hash to make it anonymous.

properties.name: DeviceName
properties.summary: Name of the computer running Rhino. If the computer is part of a Windows Domain, the computer name has "@[DOMAIN]" appended.

properties.name: RunningAsRhinoInside
properties.summary: Indicates whether Rhino is running inside another application. returns false if Rhino.exe is the top-level application. returns true if some other application is the top-level application.

properties.name: RunningInDarkMode
properties.summary: Returns true if the host operating system is in dark mode and Rhino supports dark mode.

properties.name: RunningInMono
properties.summary: Tests if this process is currently executing under the Mono runtime.

properties.name: RunningInRhino
properties.summary: Tests if RhinoCommon is currently executing inside of the Rhino.exe process. There are other cases where RhinoCommon could be running; specifically inside of Visual Studio when something like a windows form is being worked on in the resource editor or running stand-alone when compiled to be used as a version of OpenNURBS.

properties.name: RunningInWindowsContainer
properties.summary: Tests if this process is currently executing inside a Windows Container.

properties.name: RunningOnOSX
properties.summary: Tests if this process is currently executing on the Mac OSX platform.

properties.name: RunningOnServer
properties.summary: Tests if this process is currently executing in a server environment.

properties.name: RunningOnWindows
properties.summary: Tests if this process is currently executing on the Windows platform.

properties.name: SendDebugToCommandLine
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether debug messages are printed to the command line.

events.name: OnExceptionReport
events.summary: Is raised when an exception is reported with one of the ExceptionReport(Exception) method.

events.name: OnSendLogMessageToCloud
events.summary: Is raised when an exception is reported with one of the method.
